content.query:
IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT * FROM sys.external_file_formats WHERE name = 'SynapseParquetFormat') 
	CREATE EXTERNAL FILE FORMAT [SynapseParquetFormat] 
	WITH ( FORMAT_TYPE = PARQUET)
GO

IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT * FROM sys.external_data_sources WHERE name = 'synapse-container_rainbowstorageadls_dfs_core_windows_net') 
	CREATE EXTERNAL DATA SOURCE [synapse-container_rainbowstorageadls_dfs_core_windows_net] 
	WITH (
		LOCATION = 'abfss://synapse-container@rainbowstorageadls.dfs.core.windows.net' 
	)
GO

CREATE EXTERNAL TABLE dbo.iris (
	[sepal.length] float,
	[sepal.width] float,
	[petal.length] float,
	[petal.width] float,
	[variety] nvarchar(4000)
	)
	WITH (
	LOCATION = 'iris.parquet',
	DATA_SOURCE = [synapse-container_rainbowstorageadls_dfs_core_windows_net],
	FILE_FORMAT = [SynapseParquetFormat]
	)
GO


SELECT TOP 100 * FROM dbo.iris
GO

IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT * FROM sys.external_file_formats WHERE name = 'SynapseDelimitedTextFormat') 
	CREATE EXTERNAL FILE FORMAT [SynapseDelimitedTextFormat] 
	WITH ( FORMAT_TYPE = DELIMITEDTEXT ,
	       FORMAT_OPTIONS (
			 FIELD_TERMINATOR = ',',
			 FIRST_ROW = 11,
			 USE_TYPE_DEFAULT = FALSE
			))
GO

IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT * FROM sys.external_data_sources WHERE name = 'synapse-container_rainbowstorageadls_dfs_core_windows_net') 
	CREATE EXTERNAL DATA SOURCE [synapse-container_rainbowstorageadls_dfs_core_windows_net] 
	WITH (
		LOCATION = 'abfss://synapse-container@rainbowstorageadls.dfs.core.windows.net' 
	)
GO

Drop EXTERNAL TABLE dbo.GiantPeople;

CREATE EXTERNAL TABLE dbo.GaintPeople (
	[id] bigint,
	[name] nvarchar(4000),
	[gender] nvarchar(4000),
	[country] nvarchar(4000),
	[continent] nvarchar(4000),
	[height_cm] bigint,
	[height_ft_in] nvarchar(4000),
	[weight_kg] bigint,
	[birth_year] bigint,
	[death_year] bigint,
	[lifespan] bigint,
	[occupation] nvarchar(4000),
	[medical_condition] nvarchar(4000),
	[is_alive] bigint
	)
	WITH (
	LOCATION = 'tallest_people_in_the_world.csv',
	DATA_SOURCE = [synapse-container_rainbowstorageadls_dfs_core_windows_net],
	FILE_FORMAT = [SynapseDelimitedTextFormat]
	)
GO


SELECT TOP 100 * FROM dbo.GaintPeople
GO

SELECT *
FROM OPENROWSET(
    BULK 'https://rainbowstorageadls.dfs.core.windows.net/synapse-container/tallest_people_in_the_world.csv',
    FORMAT = 'CSV',
    HEADER_ROW = TRUE,
    PARSER_VERSION = '2.0'
) as [result];

-- Openrowset Extended

SELECT COUNTRY, ROUND(SUM(REVENUE_USD), 2) AS TOTAL_REVENUE
FROM OPENROWSET(
    BULK 'https://rainbowstorageadls.dfs.core.windows.net/synapse-container/apple_global_sales_dataset.csv',
    FORMAT = 'CSV',
    HEADER_ROW = TRUE,
    PARSER_VERSION = '2.0'
) AS [RESULT]
GROUP BY COUNTRY
ORDER BY COUNTRY ASC;


CREATE VIEW APPLE_REVENUE AS 
SELECT COUNTRY, ROUND(SUM(REVENUE_USD), 2) AS TOTAL_REVENUE
FROM OPENROWSET(
    BULK 'https://rainbowstorageadls.dfs.core.windows.net/synapse-container/apple_global_sales_dataset.csv',
    FORMAT = 'CSV',
    HEADER_ROW = TRUE,
    PARSER_VERSION = '2.0'
) AS [RESULT]
GROUP BY COUNTRY;


SELECT * FROM APPLE_REVENUE;


CREATE VIEW APPLE_REVENUE_TOP_10 AS 
WITH TOP_RANKED AS (
SELECT 
COUNTRY, 
ROUND(SUM(REVENUE_USD), 2) AS TOTAL_REVENUE,
ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY SUM(REVENUE_USD) DESC) AS RN
FROM OPENROWSET(
    BULK 'https://rainbowstorageadls.dfs.core.windows.net/synapse-container/apple_global_sales_dataset.csv',
    FORMAT = 'CSV',
    HEADER_ROW = TRUE,
    PARSER_VERSION = '2.0'
) AS [RESULT]
GROUP BY COUNTRY
)
SELECT 
COUNTRY, 
TOTAL_REVENUE
FROM TOP_RANKED
WHERE RN < 11;

SELECT * FROM APPLE_REVENUE_TOP_10;


CREATE VIEW PLAYER_CLUBS AS
SELECT 
PLAYER.PLAYER_ID,
PLAYER.[NAME] AS PLAYER_NAME,
PLAYER.country_of_birth,
PLAYER.country_of_citizenship,
CLUB.*
FROM OPENROWSET(
    BULK 'https://rainbowstorageadls.dfs.core.windows.net/synapse-container/players.csv',
    FORMAT = 'CSV',
    HEADER_ROW = TRUE,
    PARSER_VERSION = '2.0'
) AS PLAYER
INNER JOIN OPENROWSET(
    BULK 'https://rainbowstorageadls.dfs.core.windows.net/synapse-container/clubs.csv',
    FORMAT = 'CSV',
    HEADER_ROW = TRUE,
    PARSER_VERSION = '2.0'
) AS CLUB
ON PLAYER.current_club_id = CLUB.club_id;


SELECT * FROM PLAYER_CLUBS;
